items.title: What $1 million buys you in real estate around the world
items.description: Luxury real estate in most major markets around the world continues to become more expensive, as the wealthy grow wealthier and more mobile.

items.title: LVMH CEO Arnault warns of 'world catastrophe' if Middle East conflict is not resolved
items.description: Arnault warned of "very serious" economic consequences of the Iran war after the conflict hit the luxury conglomerates first-quarter sales last week.

items.title: Moncler shares struggle despite defying luxury's Middle East slump
items.description: Moncler earnings 'smashes' expectations following a series of underwhelming reports from European luxury players last week.

items.title: NYC property tax controversy: Here's what to know
items.description: CNBC's Robert Frank joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the latest attempt in New York to boost tax revenue.

items.title: Kering looks to double profits as it unveils ambitious turnaround plan to revive Gucci
items.description: The "ReconKering" strategy announced Thursday includes more than doubling its 2025 recurring operating margin of 11.1%.
